sections.name: hero
sections.title: About AI-Setu ERP
sections.subtitle: AI-Setu ERP empowers retailers with modern technology to simplify store management. We help SMEs automate operations, improve efficiency, and grow faster with intelligent ERP solutions.

sections.name: about
sections.title: WE ARE ON A DRIVE TO MAKE THE RETAIL INDUSTRY MORE EFFICIENT.

items.description: AI-Setu ERP is the future of retail. From empowering offline stores to managing their inventory and sales with smart technology.
SMEs often struggle to find a comprehensive cloud-based ERP and POS solution that can scale with their growth.
AI-Setu ERP empowers SMEs to use modern ERP tools without complexity and grow their business with automation and analytics.

sections.name: mission
sections.title: Our Mission
sections.subtitle: Retail businesses are the backbone of the Indian economy, yet many rely on outdated tools. AI-Setu ERP brings modern technology to retail businesses, enabling inventory tracking, billing, sales analytics, and smarter decisions with ease.

sections.name: serve
sections.title: WHO DO WE SERVE?
sections.subtitle: We serve all types of retail businesses with our ERP solutions.

sections.name: cta
sections.title: Transform Your Retail Business
sections.subtitle: Join retailers who are already using AI-Setu ERP to streamline operations.
